description:
A machine learning researcher needs to link the official code implementations to their corresponding papers in the Zotero library. Attach the following GitHub repository URLs to their respective papers:

1. 'Attention Is All You Need' -> https://github.com/tensorflow/tensor2tensor
2. 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding' -> https://github.com/google-research/bert
3. 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' -> https://github.com/KaimingHe/deep-residual-networks

targets.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
